sub_pixel_system.notes: No sub-pixel system data documented for this racing game

special_mechanics.name: Vehicle Physics
special_mechanics.description: Racing game featuring Lotus Esprit Turbo SE and Lotus Elan SE cars with terrain-based physics. Hills and hollows affect car speed during acceleration/deceleration. Different road surfaces (slippery winter courses, puddles) alter handling characteristics.

special_mechanics.name: Course Design
special_mechanics.description: Time trial based arcade-oriented gameplay. Tracks feature varying turns indicated by road-side signs, with turn difficulty reflected by sign density. Courses include obstacles and hazards dependent on scenery (winter slippery roads, road blocks, puddles, logs).

tier_notes: Tier 3 - Racing game with no documented specific movement parameters, gravity values, or jump physics. Physics data is qualitative (terrain effects, surface friction) rather than quantitative. Source material focuses on gameplay mechanics and features rather than technical physics specifications.
